glosses.ja: ヘルメット; ヘッドホン

translations.vi: Bạn đã lấy mũ bảo hiểm chưa?
translations.hi: क्या तुम अपना हेलमेट ले आए?

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; marks the subject of the finite verb.
Auxiliary verb ‘avoir’, present indicative, 2nd person singular; forms the passé composé with the past participle.
Past participle of ‘prendre’; combines with ‘avoir’ to form the perfect; no agreement here since the direct object follows.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; masculine singular form modifying ‘casque’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the verb phrase ‘as pris’.

sentences.target: Je cherche mon casque au salon.

translations.fr: Je cherche mon casque au salon.
translations.en: I'm looking for my headphones in the living room.
translations.es: Estoy buscando mis auriculares en el salón.
translations.de: Ich suche meine Kopfhörer im Wohnzimmer.
translations.it: Sto cercando le mie cuffie in salotto.
translations.ru: Я ищу свои наушники в гостиной.
translations.pt: Estou procurando meus fones de ouvido na sala de estar.
translations.he: אני מחפש את האוזניות שלי בסלון.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm tai nghe của mình trong phòng khách.
translations.ar: أبحث عن سماعاتي في غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: Ik zoek mijn koptelefoon in de woonkamer.
translations.uk: Я шукаю свої навушники у вітальні.
translations.hi: मैं लिविंग रूम में अपने हेडफ़ोन ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω τα ακουστικά μου στο σαλόνι.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter hodetelefonene mine i stuen.
translations.id: Saya mencari headphone saya di ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter mina hörlurar i vardagsrummet.
translations.cs: Hledám svoje sluchátka v obývacím pokoji.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter mine høretelefoner i stuen.
translations.ja: リビングで自分のヘッドホンを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; masculine singular form modifying ‘casque’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘cherche’.
Contracted preposition ‘à’ + definite article ‘le’; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’.

sentences.target: On partage le casque pendant l'appel.

translations.fr: On partage le casque pendant l'appel.
translations.en: We share the headset during the call.
translations.es: Compartimos los audífonos durante la llamada.
translations.de: Wir teilen uns das Headset während des Anrufs.
translations.it: Condividiamo le cuffie durante la chiamata.
translations.zh-Hans: 通话时我们共用一个耳麦。
translations.yue: 通話期間我哋共用一個耳麥。
translations.ru: Во время звонка мы пользуемся одной гарнитурой.
translations.pt: Nós compartilhamos o headset durante a chamada.
translations.he: אנחנו חולקים אוזניות עם מיקרופון בזמן השיחה.
translations.vi: Trong cuộc gọi, chúng tôi dùng chung một tai nghe có mic.
translations.ar: نحن نتشارك سماعة الرأس أثناء المكالمة.
translations.nl: Tijdens het gesprek delen we één headset.
translations.uk: Під час дзвінка ми користуємося однією гарнітурою.
translations.hu: A hívás közben egy fejhallgatót közösen használunk.
translations.hi: कॉल के दौरान हम एक हेडसेट साझा करते हैं.
translations.pl: Podczas rozmowy korzystamy z jednego zestawu słuchawkowego.
translations.el: Κατά τη διάρκεια της κλήσης μοιραζόμαστε ένα ακουστικό με μικρόφωνο.
translations.nb: Under samtalen deler vi ett headset.
translations.id: Saat panggilan, kami berbagi satu headset.
translations.sv: Under samtalet delar vi på ett headset.
translations.ro: În timpul apelului împărțim o pereche de căști cu microfon.
translations.da: Under opkaldet deler vi et headset.
translations.ja: 通話中に同じヘッドセットを使います。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; takes 3rd person singular agreement and often means ‘we’ in colloquial French.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with ‘on’; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘casque’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘partage’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Elided definite article before a vowel; masculine singular here with ‘appel’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘pendant’.

sentences.target: Pose ton casque sur l'étagère, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /poz tɔ̃ kask syʁ letaʒɛʁ sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Pose ton casque sur l'étagère, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /poz tɔ̃ kask syʁ letaʒɛʁ sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Put your helmet on the shelf, please.
translations.es: Pon tu casco en la estantería, por favor.
translations.de: Leg bitte deinen Helm auf das Regal.
translations.it: Metti il tuo casco sulla mensola, per favore.
translations.zh-Hans: 请把你的头盔放在架子上。
translations.yue: 麻煩你把個頭盔擺喺層架上面。
translations.ru: Пожалуйста, положи свой шлем на полку.
translations.pt: Coloca o seu capacete na prateleira, por favor.
translations.he: בבקשה הנח את הקסדה שלך על המדף.
translations.vi: Vui lòng đặt mũ bảo hiểm của bạn lên kệ.
translations.ar: من فضلك ضع خوذتك على الرف.
translations.nl: Leg alsjeblieft je helm op de plank.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, поклади свій шолом на полицю.
translations.hu: Tedd a sisakodat a polcra, kérlek.
translations.hi: कृपया अपना हेलमेट शेल्फ पर रखो.
translations.pl: Proszę, połóż swój kask na półce.
translations.el: Βάλε το κράνος σου στο ράφι, παρακαλώ.
translations.nb: Vennligst legg hjelmen din på hyllen.
translations.id: Tolong letakkan helm kamu di rak.
translations.sv: Lägg din hjälm på hyllan, tack.
translations.ro: Te rog, pune casca pe raft.
translations.cs: Prosím, polož svou helmu na polici.
translations.da: Læg venligst din hjelm på hylden.
translations.ja: ヘルメットを棚に置いてください。

tokens.explanation: Verb in the imperative mood, 2nd person singular; a directive addressed to ‘tu’.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; masculine singular modifying ‘casque’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the imperative ‘Pose’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement (‘sur l’étagère’).
Elided definite article before a vowel; feminine singular here (stands for ‘la’) with ‘étagère’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘sur’.
Elided subordinating conjunction ‘si’ before ‘il’; opens the clause in the fixed polite formula ‘s’il te plaît’ (‘if it pleases you’).
3rd person singular subject pronoun; impersonal ‘it’ as the subject of ‘plaît’ in the formula.
Clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular; indirect object (dative) of ‘plaît’ (‘to you’).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with ‘il’; part of the set phrase ‘s’il te plaît’ meaning ‘please’.

We share the headset during the call.
Put your helmet on the shelf, please.
